dataset_goal: Used to optimize action item extraction prompts and evaluate assignee, task, deadline, and evidence handling.

how_to_use.prompt_optimization_target: Reduce false positives, improve assignee and deadline extraction, and preserve source text evidence.
how_to_use.few_shot_usage: Use one positive assignment example and one negative discussion-only example as few-shot demonstrations.

transcript_segments.speaker: Manager
transcript_segments.text: Alice, please send the revised client deck by Friday morning.

transcript_segments.speaker: Alice
transcript_segments.text: Sure, I will send the revised client deck by Friday morning.

reference_action_items.source_text: Sure, I will send the revised client deck by Friday morning.

transcript_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
transcript_segments.text: Maybe we should simplify the signup flow before launch.

transcript_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
transcript_segments.text: That could help, but we still need more feedback from users.

cases.title: Ambiguous Owner
optimize_for: deadline extraction from vague time phrases

transcript_segments.speaker: Lead
transcript_segments.text: Someone should follow up with the vendor this week.

cases.notes: Checks whether the model invents an owner.

cases.title: Launch Readiness Follow-ups

transcript_segments.speaker: Director
transcript_segments.text: Nina, please send the final launch checklist by 3 PM.

transcript_segments.speaker: Nina
transcript_segments.text: I will send the final launch checklist by 3 PM.

transcript_segments.text: Raj, can you verify the analytics dashboard before tomorrow's review?

transcript_segments.text: Yes, I will verify the analytics dashboard tonight.

transcript_segments.text: We should also discuss whether the help center article needs edits.

Yes, I will verify the analytics dashboard tonight.

cases.notes: Held-out test with both explicit and non-action discussion.
